subject: Fw: From Msg Sheet
body:
I know you'll say no ...

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note

----- Original Message -----
From: lesley <lgroff@nysgmail.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Wed Oct 10 11:59:33 2007
Subject: From Msg Sheet

From: Dan Dubno Taken by: LESLEY on 10/10/2007
Phone# 917 453 1493

I was thinking...maybe we should have a party for Jeffrey.  Something to let him know that all of us care about him.  I'm willing to be on the committee to organize.  I know Brockman would be too..and I spoke with Danny Hillis the other day...we are all concerned and want him to know we appreciate him no matter what.  I think we could get alot of smart people together and have a nice time.  What do you think?

** End of Message
